targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) - (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND(((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)) - 1) * 100, 2) AS value;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND(((SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1) / (SELECT market_value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1)) - 1) * 100, 2) AS value;

targets.queryText: SELECT dividends_today AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT dividends_today AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, market_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, market_value AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT h.symbol, ROUND(h.weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, ROUND(h.market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(h.current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield FROM daily_holdings h WHERE h.as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY h.weight_pct DESC LIMIT 10;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT h.symbol, ROUND(h.weight_pct, 1) AS weight_pct, ROUND(h.market_value, 0) AS mv, ROUND(h.current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield FROM daily_holdings h WHERE h.as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) ORDER BY h.weight_pct DESC LIMIT 10;
